name: AI Tool Discovery at Scale: All You Need is DNS

description: arXiv:2607.18242v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The coming era of autonomous AI agents demands a discovery mechanism capable of navigating millions of tools, yet existing solutions buckle under O(N) complexity and centralized governance. Instead of building another fragile overlay, we propose ToolDNS, a radical framework that retrofits semantic tool discovery onto the Internet's most resilient...
author: Enhao Chen, Yulin Shao
